en: Thank you very much. I thought for sure, no. Okay. Thank you so much. This is such an honor and to be voted by the peers, it's just incredible.

And I have to say, the show is so wonderful because of Debra Kahn, who writes our show. And any one of you would be so lucky to be on this show. Her writing is so good. And Rufus, who is with me, you are so good in this show, as is every single actor on this show.
ko: 우리 쇼를 쓰는 데브라 칸 덕분이에요.
